falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes above 4,200 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would contradict the bearish pattern similarity to March 2020, invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.25% and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong risk-on sentiment conflicting with the blowoff pattern, disproving the current market phase assessment

falsification_conditions.condition: Bitcoin price increases by 25% from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp crypto rally would invalidate the blowoff score's implication of extreme market stress and pattern validity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
